============================================================
  JSON config (for manual setup)
============================================================
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "qq-bridge": {
      "name": "QQ Bridge",
      "type": "stdio",
      "command": "C:/Users/magellan/Desktop/助手/.venv/Scripts/python.exe",
      "args": [
        "C:/Users/magellan/Desktop/助手/qq_mcp_bridge/server.py"
      ],
      "env": {},
      "description": "QQ Bridge - send/receive QQ private and group messages"
    }
  }
}

============================================================
  One-click Install URL (paste in browser)
============================================================
cherrystudio://mcp/install?

============================================================
  Usage
============================================================
  1. Copy the cherrystudio:// URL above into your browser address bar
  2. CherryStudio will auto-open and install the MCP server
  3. Go to Settings -> MCP Server -> enable 'QQ Bridge'
  4. In chat, click the MCP button to activate tools
